highlights: Kim Yun-shin retrospective at Hoam Museum (March 17 - June 28).
Damien Hirst major survey at MMCA Seoul.
March Avery's first solo show at Esther Schipper Seoul.
Spectrosynthesis Seoul at Art Sonje Center exploring queer art.
Seo-Seoul Museum of Art (newly opened) focused on media art.
10 Years anniversary exhibition at Perrotin Seoul.

stocks.market_sentiment: High volatility and cautious; markets reeling from the U.S.-Iran conflict impacts.
key_events: U.S.-Iran conflict driving 40% surge in oil prices ($103/bbl).
South Korea facing 'triple high' crisis: high oil, high inflation, weak won.
Government planning price caps and increased nuclear/coal power generation.
Investment banks like Goldman Sachs remain long-term bullish on KOSPI (7,000 target), citing semiconductor/AI super-cycle.
Legislative approval for $350B investment commitment to U.S. strategic sectors.
